title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 45–48, this part focuses on Unknown person #41, Unknown person #42, Yamato, Unknown person #43, Unknown person #44, King as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: No, that young lady's a nurse.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: You're right, white- beard beat me again...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the one who pulled me out of the sea?

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Hey! Don't do anything reckless, ace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: You aren't able to swim any- more!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: If you fall into the ocean...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's fine, you'll be there if that happens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: It was your best fight yet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: you even made him use his powers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Oh, you saw that?! wasn't it great?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: The plan I thought up worked perfectly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter how hard I try, he's always got something else...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's not the face of someone who's been losing repeatedly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not like I blame you or guy- thing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Well, you look like you're having fun.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Being the man you are, it really fires you up, doesn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know I'm the one who trained ace...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but fighting him at his current level, day after day... it's just too much for you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you asking me to stop fighting him?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This isn't a fight you can just stop.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Although the medicine is giving you some relief...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Your condition is only getting worse.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 53 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
